title: Sample Custom Quiz
description: A short example showing the JSON format, including math and diagrams.

questions.prompt: In the right triangle shown, what is the hypotenuse $c$?

questions.passage: Paste any reading passage here. It appears above the question so several questions can share one passage.
questions.prompt: A question that refers to the passage above.
questions.explanation: The 'answer' may be a letter (A), the option text, or its number (1).
